title: THRESHOLD INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: EMERGENCE FLORENCE THRESHOLD INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an intensive outpatient program. Individual and family therapy sessions available weekly as needed. Individualized treatment plans and therapy. Issues addressed include alcohol/drug use, domestic violence issues, self-esteem, assertiveness, sexuality, body image, nutrition, eating disorders, relationships, grief and loss, parenting and childcare issues, HIV/AIDS, sexual abuse, addiction in the family, relapse, recovery and spirituality. An MRT group to address thinking distortions is an additional option. 4969 Highway 101 Suite 3 Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 967-6597 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 967-6597 After Hours Emergency (541) 607-4821 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: OHP, sliding scale DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: No standard hours Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - DISCOVERY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EMERGENCE FLORENCE
